  1. Home
  2. About

About Covai Accounting Services

Covai Accounting Services is a Coimbatore-based GST Practitioner and tax consultancy built for business owners who need more than statutory boxes ticked — they need a compliance partner who understands their industry and stands behind every filing. Since 2012, our practice has rested on three disciplines that set it apart: sector-specific depth across Coimbatore's textile, jewellery, engineering and IT industries; direct access to the practitioner actually handling your file; and a reconciliation-first approach that catches discrepancies before they become notices, not after.

A decade of Coimbatore industry practice

Founded in 2012 and headquartered in Vadavalli, Covai Accounting Services has spent over a decade working alongside the industries that define this city's economy — textile and spinning mills, jewellery retailers, engineering and auto-component manufacturers, IT and software firms, and the traders and MSMEs that form its backbone. That sustained focus gives us a working understanding of how compliance plays out in each of these sectors in practice, not just what the statute requires on paper.

We operate as an Enrolled GST Practitioner (Enrolment No. 331800001760GPU, GSTN 33AAWFC3995L1ZM), with our practice organised into six focused areas — GST advisory and litigation, income tax and TDS/TCS compliance, accounting and financial reporting, payroll and labour law, business incorporation, and MSME and trade certification — all handled in-house.

How we work

  • Reconciliation before response — every notice, refund and return is checked against your actual books before we file anything
  • Direct practitioner access — you deal with the person handling your file, not a call-centre queue
  • Statutory grounding — our replies and appeals cite the relevant sections and precedent, not templated language
  • Coimbatore-first — we work with the local ROC, GST range office and labour department routinely, and that familiarity shows in how quickly matters move

Who we work with

Our clients range from proprietorships and partnerships filing their first GST registration, to growing private limited companies managing ROC compliance, spinning mills and jewellers navigating complex GST disputes, and IT and software companies in Saravanampatti handling incorporation and payroll from day one.

At a glance

  • Rating: 4.9★ Google Reviews

  • Hours: Mon – Sat, 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM
Get in touch
Our practice areas

Everything under one roof

GST Advisory & Compliance

End-to-end GST support for Coimbatore businesses — registration, returns, notice replies, appeals, refunds and cancellations, handled by an Enrolled GST Practitioner.

Direct Tax & Income Tax Advisory

Income tax return filing for individuals, firms and companies, plus complete TDS/TCS compliance, from a Coimbatore-based practice that tracks every Finance Act change.

Accounting & Financial Reporting

Monthly bookkeeping, MIS reporting and statutory financial statements that keep Coimbatore MSMEs, traders and manufacturers audit-ready all year round.

Payroll, Labour Law & Statutory HR Compliance

Payroll processing, PF/ESI, Professional Tax and contract labour compliance for Coimbatore employers — mills, factories, IT firms and retail establishments alike.

Business Incorporation & Corporate Compliance

Private Limited, OPC, Section 8 and LLP incorporation for Coimbatore founders, followed by disciplined ROC annual filings and secretarial compliance.

MSME, Trade & Digital Certification Services

Udyam registration, Import Export Code and Digital Signature Certificates to get Coimbatore MSMEs and exporters trade-ready and digitally compliant.

Work with a Coimbatore team that knows your industry

Book a free consultation and tell us what you’re dealing with.

Call +91 90957 23458 Send a message
